architecture.uml:
left to right direction actor User node "Clock Radio" actor "Radio Transmitter" as TX
User -- "Clock Radio" --
User -- "Clock Radio" --
TX -- "Clock Radio" --
architecture.description: Top-level logical context for a radio receiver alarm clock.

interface.description: The user enters the alarm time and enables or disables the alarm.
interface.software: The interface SHALL accept alarm time and alarm enable input from the user.

interface.description: The clock radio provides audible output to the user.
interface.software: The interface SHALL provide audible radio or alarm output perceived by the user.

interface.description: The external transmitter provides a radio channel to the clock radio receiver.
interface.software: The interface SHALL convey received radio-frequency signal from the external transmitter into the receiver path.
